violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the deli area display case including door tracks, and a shelf outside the walk in cooler in the cooking area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the production walk-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the vents in several open-air cases have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The area around the trash compactor has a small accumulation of leaf litter and debris. Refuse areas shall be maintained free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The floors under the shelving in the sales area have an accumulation of dust and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
